issues.detail: The instructions do not cover error handling or edge cases.
The skill assumes Linux/macOS environment and does not support Windows.
Hardcoded credentials are present in the skill file.

scenarios.name: Quick misconfig + info-disclosure scan with HTML report
scenarios.rationale: Treatment runs nikto -h with -Tuning 23 and -o report.html -Format html per the documented tuning categories; baseline suggests curl checks or generic scanners and misses Nikto's tuning flags.

scenarios.name: Chain Nmap discovery into Nikto scans
scenarios.rationale: Treatment reproduces the documented nmap -sV -p ... -oG - | grep open | awk | while read ip; do nikto -h $ip -o ... -Format html pipeline; baseline runs nmap separately and does not feed results into Nikto.
